---
title: '2014/02/12 Journal Too Wed'
date: '2014-02-13T02:55:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4813633269785523401'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140212-journal-too-wed.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/winter-255b11-255d-a85dd899929e.jpg"><img style="border-right-width: 0px; margin: 5px 45px 5px 5px; display: inline; border-top-width: 0px; border-bottom-width: 0px; border-left-width: 0px" title="Winter" border="0" alt="Winter" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEgfrBu729suZphyFAcvs1BBS9YkJI96v2MGnPYeNgBU-FRKvBWyk7uTP_T4xV8gLGxDaZzxiCOiBn6V4qNBcTYKNOvICvylK5V5NNBO88_I4jPiZucnBQy7pDTQj1ZSTAih38wvtgX0YSk/?imgmax=800" width="244" height="184"></a>  <p>Iâ€™m writing this as a <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com" target="_blank">test</a>. Iâ€™m using Windows Live Writer and I want to see how it actually works.&nbsp; </p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>This was a test, and only a test. Of the not an emergency broadcasting system. </p>
